content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be restructured to prioritize "curiosity residue"—the fading, low-confidence uncertainty traces left by ICM/RND curiosity-driven exploration—rather than only storing high-value labeled data for future active sampling. This creates a self-reinforcing cycle where the agent’s memory continuously seeds new curious exploration instead of just culling unlabeled low-value experiences.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
